title: leucanthemum pseudosylvaticum
intro: Leucanthemum pseudosylvaticum, also known as the mountain daisy, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties. The plant is said to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and supporting the immune system. Leucanthemum pseudosylvaticum can be prepared into teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a versatile herbal remedy for various ailments.
